title: EXPLORER’S GUIDE TO THEMATIC NETWORKS
subtitle: HOW TO DESIGN AND IMPLEMENT THEMATIC NETWORKS TO MAXIMISE USER ENGAGEMENT AND IMPACT
description: A practical guide for thematic network coordinators and consortium members, providing a framework to design and implement multi-actor thematic networks under Horizon 2020. It consolidates best practices, tools and examples to enhance user engagement, knowledge exchange, dissemination, exploitation and sustainability of network outputs.
